feat.name: Boundless Reprisals
feat.text: With a sixth sense for the flow of combat, you can quickly react to any situation as required. At the start of each enemy’s turn, you gain a reaction you can use only during that turn for any reaction from a class feat or class feature.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
